name: Luxe Cashmere Trench Coat
description: Indulge in the ultimate luxury with this double-breasted trench coat crafted from 100% pure Mongolian cashmere. Designed for an elegant drape and timeless style.

name: Silk Button-Down Blouse
description: An essential wardrobe staple made of premium mulberry silk. Features a clean concealed placket and mother-of-pearl buttons.

name: Tailored Wool Trousers
description: Expertly cut wool trousers with a sharp front crease and structured high-rise waist. Designed for modular pairing with silk shirts.

name: Structured Velvet Blazer
description: Double-breasted velvet blazer featuring structured shoulders, satin peak lapels, and custom gold-finished hardware.

name: Minimalist Slip Dress
description: An elegant bias-cut dress crafted from heavy-weight satin, featuring a cowl neck and delicate cross-back straps.

name: Full-Grain Leather Tote Bag
description: A spacious everyday carryall in Italian full-grain pebbled leather. Features an unlined interior and a detachable zippered pouch.

name: Classic Leather Chelsea Boots
description: Timeless leather Chelsea boots with elasticated side panels and a stacked leather heel. Handcrafted in Spain.

name: Saddle Crossbody Bag
description: Architectural saddle-shaped bag in smooth boxcalf leather, featuring custom brass clasp closures and an adjustable strap.

name: Bifold Calfskin Wallet
description: Slim bifold wallet made from premium french calfskin. Features six card slots and a dedicated bill compartment.

name: Soft Suede Weekender Bag
description: Generously sized travel duffel in ultra-soft split suede leather. Includes reinforced base studs and a leather shoulder pad.

name: Chronograph Oyster Gold Watch
description: An exquisite automatic watch in 18k yellow gold finish, featuring a signature black dial, tachymeter bezel, and oysterlink bracelet.

name: Minimalist Rose-Gold Watch
description: Ultra-thin watch featuring a polished rose-gold case, clean eggshell dial, and an interchangeable Italian leather strap.

name: Skeleton Automatic Watch
description: Admire the mechanical artistry of this self-winding skeleton watch. Features a sapphire crystal glass and gunmetal bezel.

name: Classic Steel Dress Watch
description: A refined watch in brushed surgical-grade stainless steel. Powered by a highly accurate Swiss quartz movement.

name: Noir Leather Strap Watch
description: An all-black watch with matte casing, black sunray dial, and full-grain black leather strap. Peak stealth luxury.

name: Oud Impérial Parfum
description: A rich, mysterious fragrance built around precious agarwood (oud), warm amber, dry spices, and a touch of wild rose.

name: Santale Sauvage Eau de Cologne
description: A clean, woody fragrance highlighting creamy Australian sandalwood, green cardamom, and fresh cedarwood accords.

name: Amber Seduction Candle Set
description: Two hand-poured soy wax candles in black ceramic vessels, scented with rich amber, vanilla bean, and toasted oak.

name: Verveine Citron Room Diffuser
description: A luxury reed diffuser releasing uplifting top notes of French lemon verbena, layered over wild thyme and musk.

name: Néroli Renaissance Scent
description: Capturing the essence of the Italian Riviera. Bitter orange flower blended with citrus oils, rosemary, and white amber.

name: Handmade Ribbed Ceramic Vase
description: An architectural stoneware vase in a matte sand finish. Features a tactile ribbed texture. Perfect for dry botanical displays.

name: Bouclé Bouclé Accent Pillow
description: Soft textured pillow woven from wool and alpaca bouclé fibers in natural cream. Includes a premium feather insert.

name: Travertine Marble Tray
description: Sculpted from a single block of raw Italian travertine marble. Ideal as a centerpiece tray for vanity or entry table.

name: Merino Wool Throw Blanket
description: Generously sized, waffle-woven throw blanket in 100% fine Merino wool. Extremely warm yet lightweight and breathable.

name: Brass Arch Table Lamp
description: A sculptural table lamp featuring an arched arm in brushed solid brass and a spherical sand-blasted glass shade.

name: Alabaster Sculptural Bowl
description: Hand-carved translucent alabaster bowl. The organic marble-like veins mean each piece is entirely unique.

name: Suede Leather Slippers
description: Premium indoor slippers in rich brown split suede, lined with exceptionally plush shearling wool for supreme comfort.

name: Linen Kimono Robe
description: A relaxed, lightweight robe woven from 100% organic French flax linen. Softens beautifully with every wash.

name: Gilt Rim Crystal Tumblers (Set of 4)
description: Mouth-blown crystal whiskey tumblers with a hand-painted 24k gold rim. Classic weight and exceptional brilliance.

name: Gold Thread Linen Tablecloth
description: Heavyweight linen tablecloth in oatmeal, woven with subtle gold metallic threads. Elevates any dinner setting.
